title: Madhya Pradesh High Court grants bail to two Muslim men arrested for Instagram reel supporting Iran
description: The Madhya Pradesh High Court has granted bail to two men, who were arrested last month after appearing in an Instagram reel expressing support for Iran in the ongoing conflict West Asia war [Wasim Khan and Others v The State of Madhya Pradesh]The accused Wasim Khan and Yousuf Mehafooz were arrested on March 8 on a complaint by one Brajesh Chavariya. They were booked under Section 196(1)(a) of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) for allegedly promoting enmity between different groups.As per the compla
